premise: My brother, a neurologist, tricked our father into granting him medical power of attorney and then drained $380,000 from a custodial account I co-owned by billing for sham home visits. I filed a complaint with the state medical board, got his license suspended, and won a $520,000 civil judgment that forced him to sell his practice.

thumb.label: Thumbnail + metadata
thumb.detail: My Brother Drained Dad's Account Of $380K, Left Me Nothing. So I Took His Medica
